activities.description: Arrive at hotel, check in, and spend the afternoon relaxing on South Beach. Enjoy the crystal-clear waters and white sand.
Authentic halal Mediterranean and Middle Eastern cuisine in the heart of South Beach. Known for their lamb dishes, fresh hummus, and grilled kebabs.
Walk along the iconic Art Deco district, enjoy the vibrant nightlife atmosphere and street performers.
Half-day guided snorkeling tour exploring the beautiful coral reefs and marine life of Biscayne Bay. Equipment and instruction included.
Famous halal street food featuring chicken and gyro platters with their signature white sauce. Quick, delicious, and budget-friendly.
Visit Miami's famous outdoor street art museum featuring colorful murals by world-renowned artists. Great for photos!
Authentic Turkish halal cuisine in South Beach. Try their Adana kebab, lahmacun, and baklava for dessert.
Stunning rooftop bar on the 7th floor with panoramic views of South Beach and the ocean. Features craft cocktails and a sophisticated atmosphere. Perfect for Saturday night!
Final morning beach walk, then grab brunch at a café on Lincoln Road before heading to the airport.
Check out of hotel and head to MIA for evening flight back to Chicago.

input.reasoning: This itinerary successfully meets all the specified constraints within the $1,400 budget for 2 travelers. The plan includes: (1) Round-trip flights from Chicago to Miami totaling $760 for both travelers, (2) A beachfront hotel with ocean views (The Betsy Hotel) for 2 nights at $490, (3) Multiple halal-friendly restaurants in South Beach including Pasha's, The Halal Guys, and Istanbul Grill & Deli, (4) A snorkeling excursion at Biscayne Bay for $140, (5) A rooftop bar experience at Juvia on Saturday night with spectacular views, and (6) Additional activities like beach time, Wynwood Walls exploration, and Art Deco district strolls. The total cost comes to $1,395, staying just under the $1,400 budget while providing a comprehensive Miami Beach experience that accommodates halal dietary requirements.
input.final_message_to_user: I've created a fantastic 2-night Miami getaway for you and your friend! Your itinerary includes a beautiful beachfront hotel with ocean views, an exciting snorkeling adventure, and several excellent halal-friendly restaurants in South Beach including Pasha's, The Halal Guys, and Istanbul Grill & Deli. For Saturday night, I've included Juvia - a spectacular rooftop bar on Lincoln Road with panoramic ocean views, perfect for cocktails and the Miami nightlife scene. The total cost is $1,395 for both travelers, staying within your $1,400 budget. You'll experience the best of South Beach with beach time, Art Deco architecture, Wynwood's street art, and of course, amazing halal dining options!
